articles.title: Brobbey, Gakpo double delight as slick Netherlands dismantle Sweden 5-1
articles.content: "So there was more pressure to win this match. We knew it was a must-win," Koeman said. "But I didn't feel any tension. Then you know things are on the right track."
articles.summary:
📰 싱가포르 최신 뉴스
